content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Word Capitalization". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/281/A
constraints: The string contains only letters and spaces
There are no leading or trailing spaces in the string
There is exactly one space between each word
content.outputFormat: The input string with the first character of each word capitalized

hidden.label: max boundary
hidden.input: a b c d e f g h i j
hidden.expectedOutput: A B C D E F G H I J

solution.approach: Split the string into words, capitalize the first character of each word, and join the words back together
